public.v_contributions.definition: SELECT to_id as npo_id, COALESCE(SUM(amount_usd), 0) as total, COUNT(*) as count FROM dists WHERE status = 'settled' GROUP BY to_id
public.v_contributions.name: v_contributions

public.v_donation_total_usd.definition: SELECT fund_id, COALESCE(SUM(net), 0) as total FROM dists WHERE fund_id IS NOT NULL AND status = 'settled' GROUP BY fund_id
public.v_donation_total_usd.name: v_donation_total_usd

public.v_loss_ltd.definition: SELECT npo_id, SUM(amount) as total FROM loss_logs GROUP BY npo_id
public.v_loss_ltd.name: v_loss_ltd

public.v_referrer_commissions_ltd.definition: SELECT referrer, npo_id, SUM(amount) as total FROM referrer_commissions WHERE status = 'paid' GROUP BY referrer, npo_id
public.v_referrer_commissions_ltd.name: v_referrer_commissions_ltd

public.v_referrer_payout_ltd.definition: SELECT referrer, SUM(amount) as total FROM referrer_payouts GROUP BY referrer
public.v_referrer_payout_ltd.name: v_referrer_payout_ltd

public.v_rev_ltd.definition: SELECT npo_id, type, SUM(revenue) as total FROM rev_logs WHERE status = 'final' AND npo_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY npo_id, type
public.v_rev_ltd.name: v_rev_ltd
